common.tagline: Your travel project, in good hands.

trust.verifiedAdvisors: {count, plural, =0 {No verified advisors yet} =1 {1 verified advisor} other {# verified advisors}}

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: You must be signed in to access this page.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errors.networkError: The server is not responding. Please try again shortly.

form.title: Describe your travel project
form.subtitle: 5 steps, about 6 minutes. A verified advisor will then contact you.

step1.title: Where do you want to go?

step5.title: Your contact details
step5.subtitle: Needed so an advisor can reach you.
step5.emailHint: You will receive a confirmation link at this address.
step5.consentLabel: I consent to my contact details being shared with up to 3 verified advisors so they can send me a quote. My data is stored in Canada (Law 25); I can request its deletion at any time from the brief tracking page.
step5.consentRequired: This box must be checked to submit.

errors.rateLimitEmail: You have submitted 3 briefs from this email in 24 h. Try again in {hours} h or use another email address.
errors.rateLimitGeneric: Your request cannot be processed right now, please try again later.
errors.disposableEmail: This email looks temporary. We need a durable email to connect you with an advisor.
errors.validationFailed: The form contains errors — check the highlighted fields.

emailSent.title: Check your email
emailSent.subtitle: We sent a confirmation link to {email}.
emailSent.delayHint: There may be a slight delay. Also check your spam folder.
emailSent.resendDisabled: Didn't receive it — available in {seconds} s
emailSent.resendEnabled: Didn't receive it — resend the link
emailSent.resendSuccess: If this address exists, a new link has just been sent.

linkExpired.title: This link has expired or has already been used
linkExpired.subtitle: Request a new link by entering your email below.
linkExpired.successMessage: If this address matches an active brief, a new link has just been sent.

recap.title: Your travel brief
recap.noMatchYet: No advisor has contacted you yet.

erase.title: Delete this brief
erase.subtitle: This action is irreversible. All data for this brief will be erased.
erase.successMessage: Your data has been deleted. You will be redirected shortly.

eraseAll.title: Delete all my data
eraseAll.subtitle: This action deletes your contact and your {count} briefs in one operation. Irreversible.
eraseAll.successMessage: All your data has been deleted.

overview.title: My compliance file
overview.subtitle: Current status and submitted documents.
overview.noDossier: No compliance file has been opened yet. Start by submitting your documents.

submit.title: Submit my compliance file
submit.intro: Upload your provincial certificate (CCV or TICO) and proof of affiliation with an agency holding a valid permit.
submit.step1Description: Per Law 25 (Quebec), we require your explicit consent to process your compliance documents.
submit.consentLabel: I consent to Conseiller Voyage processing my compliance documents for verification.
submit.documentFile: Document (PDF, JPG, PNG, HEIC, max 5 MB)
submit.proofFile: Affiliation proof (PDF, JPG, PNG, HEIC, max 5 MB)
submit.step4Description: Verify the information before submission. Once submitted, an administrator will review your file within 5 business days.
submit.successMessage: Your file has been received. You will be notified by email once an administrator has reviewed it.
submit.errorMinCertificates: At least one certificate is required.
submit.errorMinAffiliations: At least one affiliation is required.
submit.errorInvalidFileType: Unsupported file type. Use PDF, JPG, PNG or HEIC.
submit.errorExpiresBeforeIssued: Expiry date must be after the issue date.

detail.title: Submission {submissionId}
detail.approveSuccess: Submission approved. The advisor will move to verified status.
detail.refuseReasonHelp: At least 20 characters. Will be communicated to the advisor.
detail.refuseReasonTooShort: Reason must contain at least 20 characters.
detail.refuseSuccess: Submission refused. The advisor can re-submit.
detail.alreadyDecided: This submission has already been decided.

admin.rematchDescription: Recomputes a fresh top 3 of verified advisors from the current state. The previous result is kept for audit.
admin.rematchRaisonPlaceholder: The 3 suggested advisors were revoked (expired permit) — ticket #…
admin.succes: New matching computed: {matchedCount, plural, =0 {no advisor found} =1 {1 advisor} other {# advisors}}.
admin.erreurEnCours: A re-matching is already in progress for this brief. Try again in a few seconds.
admin.erreurBriefIntrouvable: Brief not found or anonymized (Law 25) — re-matching is not possible.
admin.erreurBriefInactif: This brief was never matched: re-matching requires a prior result.
admin.erreurRaisonInvalide: The reason must be between 10 and 500 characters.
admin.erreurNonAutorise: You must be signed in as an administrator.
admin.erreurInterdit: This action is restricted to administrators.
admin.erreurGenerique: Re-matching failed. Retry or check the runbook.

lead.erreurConflit: The lead state changed. Reload the page and try again.
lead.erreurTransitionInvalide: This action is not allowed from the lead's current state.
lead.erreurNonVerifie: Your verified status is required to act on this lead.
lead.erreurNonProprietaire: This lead does not belong to your account.
lead.erreurIdempotency: An idempotency key is required for this action.

approved.subject: Your compliance file has been approved
approved.body: Your compliance file submitted on {submittedAt} has been approved by our team.
approved.bodyWithComment: Your compliance file submitted on {submittedAt} has been approved by our team. Administrator comment: {comment}
approved.footer: Conseiller Voyage — all your data is hosted in Canada (Law 25).

refused.subject: Your compliance file requires corrections
refused.body: Your compliance file submitted on {submittedAt} cannot be validated as-is.
refused.footer: Conseiller Voyage — all your data is hosted in Canada (Law 25).
